channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: New & Notable: “Please Respond” is bursting with jagged, pos…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: “Please Respond” is bursting with jagged, post-punk-inspired indie songs powered by winding basslines and topped with slashing riffs.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: “Please Respond” is bursting with jagged, post-punk-inspired indie songs powered by winding basslines and topped with slashing riffs.

item.title: Last Man Standing: Jan and Dean’s Dean Torrence Is Still Cru…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Last Man Standing: Jan and Dean’s Dean Torrence Is Still Cruising

"We didn’t trust the music industry at all, but we enjoyed singing. We enjoyed creating records."
item.content:encoded:
Last Man Standing: Jan and Dean’s Dean Torrence Is Still Cruising

"We didn’t trust the music industry at all, but we enjoyed singing. We enjoyed creating records."

item.title: New & Notable: Skyzoo returns with more hard-hitting bars ov…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: Skyzoo returns with more hard-hitting bars over bleary, delirious production, thick as smoke, every moment gripping.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: Skyzoo returns with more hard-hitting bars over bleary, delirious production, thick as smoke, every moment gripping.

item.title: 50 Years Ago: The Peter Frampton and Yes show turned riot. …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
50 Years Ago: The Peter Frampton and Yes show turned riot.

"Peter Frampton could have easily sold 35,000 tickets. Throw in Yes, Gentle Giant, and Gary Wright on a weekend near a college, and you have a recipe for chaos. Which is exactly what happened."
item.content:encoded:
50 Years Ago: The Peter Frampton and Yes show turned riot.

"Peter Frampton could have easily sold 35,000 tickets. Throw in Yes, Gentle Giant, and Gary Wright on a weekend near a college, and you have a recipe for chaos. Which is exactly what happened."

item.title: Have Artists Reached Their Breaking Point With AI? “The art…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Have Artists Reached Their Breaking Point With AI?

“The art of mastery in general has continued to be diluted over the years, and technology is a huge part of that."
item.content:encoded:
Have Artists Reached Their Breaking Point With AI?

“The art of mastery in general has continued to be diluted over the years, and technology is a huge part of that."

item.title: Kinrose joins The Hip Hop Show to discuss "rated pg," his ne…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Kinrose joins The Hip Hop Show to discuss "rated pg," his new release with collaborator Malik Elijah. We also take a deep dive talking about his inspirations, his deep commitment to home, and growth in artistry.
item.content:encoded: Kinrose joins The Hip Hop Show to discuss "rated pg," his new release with collaborator Malik Elijah. We also take a deep dive talking about his inspirations, his deep commitment to home, and growth in artistry.

item.title: 💪Our strength – and our independence – has always come from…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
💪Our strength – and our independence – has always come from you, the public.

Today, people are stepping up to ensure the independent journalism that millions rely on continues to thrive.

Take a minute to see why supporters are taking action, and join them with a gift today: n.pr/3SzxYze
item.content:encoded:
💪Our strength – and our independence – has always come from you, the public.

Today, people are stepping up to ensure the independent journalism that millions rely on continues to thrive.

Take a minute to see why supporters are taking action, and join them with a gift today: n.pr/3SzxYze

item.title: Only on Apple News: A True-Crime Producer Posed as an Heires…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Only on Apple News: A True-Crime Producer Posed as an Heiress — Then Allegedly Stole $30 Million

Mary Carole McDonnell made low-budget crime shows, but her own story was built on deceptions fit for one of her series. Now she’s on the FBI’s Most Wanted list.

apple.news/A8PLp8dgKSKq...
item.content:encoded:
Only on Apple News: A True-Crime Producer Posed as an Heiress — Then Allegedly Stole $30 Million

Mary Carole McDonnell made low-budget crime shows, but her own story was built on deceptions fit for one of her series. Now she’s on the FBI’s Most Wanted list.

apple.news/A8PLp8dgKSKq...

item.title: Ferrell plays a zany former golf star who's trying to regain…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Ferrell plays a zany former golf star who's trying to regain his mojo in a new Netflix series. While The Hawk has its flaws, it delivers satisfying silliness, amusing shenanigans and surprise cameos. n.pr/4fCiXEN
item.content:encoded: Ferrell plays a zany former golf star who's trying to regain his mojo in a new Netflix series. While The Hawk has its flaws, it delivers satisfying silliness, amusing shenanigans and surprise cameos. n.pr/4fCiXEN

item.title: The U.S. continued airstrikes in Iran while Tehran launched …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The U.S. continued airstrikes in Iran while Tehran launched retaliatory attacks on U.S. targets in the Gulf, as President Trump said he was close to deciding whether to launch "a massive attack." n.pr/4wn4rbh
item.content:encoded: The U.S. continued airstrikes in Iran while Tehran launched retaliatory attacks on U.S. targets in the Gulf, as President Trump said he was close to deciding whether to launch "a massive attack." n.pr/4wn4rbh

item.title: Oil surged to $100 per barrel after Iran-backed Houthi rebel…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Oil surged to $100 per barrel after Iran-backed Houthi rebels attacked two Saudi tankers in the Red Sea. And, President Trump overnight replaced expiring tariffs with a slew of new ones. n.pr/4wn4DHv
item.content:encoded: Oil surged to $100 per barrel after Iran-backed Houthi rebels attacked two Saudi tankers in the Red Sea. And, President Trump overnight replaced expiring tariffs with a slew of new ones. n.pr/4wn4DHv

item.title: Tomorrowland has put limitations on pyrotechnics and halted …
item.author: Mixmag (@mixmag.net)
item.description: Tomorrowland has put limitations on pyrotechnics and halted all large-scale fireworks amid wildfire warnings for its second weekend
item.content:encoded: Tomorrowland has put limitations on pyrotechnics and halted all large-scale fireworks amid wildfire warnings for its second weekend
